name: @prune/waterbed
description: F12 — waterbed-aware net-effect gate. Wraps any cost-transform with a GENERAL induced-cost check so a 'saving' that merely reappears elsewhere (re-ask, retry, recompute, cache-write) is netted out and vetoed. Generalizes the diff-enforcer's single-transform round-trip check. Deterministic; insufficient_data (never approve) on any missing/null input; never fabricates a number. No regex, no model call.
